candidates.why: This is the explicit operating amortization line tied to COR/COGS, but it appears as a component beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of goods and services sold'. The nearby 'Other Cost of sales and services' balancing row indicates the selected COGS row is a total that already embeds this amortization.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: This is an operating depreciation line tied to cost of revenues, but it also appears as a component under the selected COGS total rather than a separate same-level expense outside the selected COGS bucket.

This appears to be a possible summary label for COGS-related amortization/impairment, but it is blank in the preview and therefore should not be selected. In any case it appears within the COGS breakdown, not outside the selected COGS total.

variables.notes: Do not add separate COGS D&A. The selected COGS row is a parent/total, and the visible COGS-related amortization/depreciation rows appear embedded within that total.

candidates.why: There are explicit SG&A amortization rows under both 'Selling Expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses', but they are clearly sub-components of those selected parent rows, as shown by the associated balancing lines. Adding them separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A-related depreciation, but it sits within the breakdown of the selected SG&A parent rows ('Selling Expenses' and 'Administrative Expenses') rather than alongside them as a separate same-level operating line.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is an R&D amortization component nested under the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses'. Because that R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, adding this separately would distort the intended XSGA minus XRD treatment and likely double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This is an R&D depreciation component within the selected 'Research and development expenses' parent row, so it should not be added separately for the same reason as R&D amortization.

variables.notes: Do not add separate XSGA D&A. The SG&A and R&D D&A rows shown are nested components of already selected parent operating expense rows, and R&D is already handled separately through XRD.
